---
title: "Spatial Epidemiology: Disease Mapping and Surveillance"
subtitle: "Track A — Biostatistics / Track B Overlap"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Spatial Epidemiology: Disease Mapping and Surveillance

**Track**: Track A — Biostatistics / Track B Overlap

The intersection of spatial statistics and epidemiology: mapping disease risk, detecting clusters, and modeling spatio-temporal disease dynamics.

## Table of Contents

1. Disease Mapping Fundamentals
2. Conditional Autoregressive (CAR) Models
3. Cluster Detection
4. Spatio-Temporal Disease Models
5. Ecological Studies and Spatial Regression
6. Geostatistical Models for Point-Level Health Data
7. Environmental Epidemiology and Exposure Assessment
8. Infectious Disease Surveillance Systems

---

## Chapter 1: Disease Mapping Fundamentals

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Conditional Autoregressive (CAR) Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Cluster Detection

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Spatio-Temporal Disease Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Ecological Studies and Spatial Regression

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Geostatistical Models for Point-Level Health Data

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Environmental Epidemiology and Exposure Assessment

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Infectious Disease Surveillance Systems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
